name: How is fault decided in on-job forklift collision?

mainEntity.name: How is fault decided in on-job forklift collision?

acceptedAnswer.description: Workers' comp no-fault; third-party via negligence, OSHA standards, witness/expert testimony.[3] Context: Operator training failures common culprit. Key factors: Violation presumptive negligence. Practical guidance: Investigator analyzes; lawyer proves liability. Employer vicarious.
